auth_notes: Requires creating a Slack App in the Slack API dashboard, configuring Redirect URLs for n8n, and selecting specific Bot Token Scopes (e.g., chat:write, channels:read).
rate_limits: Tiered limits apply: Tier 3 (50+ requests per minute) for most chat operations; Tier 4 (100+ requests per minute) for general info retrieval.
gotchas: The Slack App must be explicitly invited to private channels using '/invite @app_name' before the API can interact with them.
OAuth2 scopes are granular; missing a single scope like 'groups:read' will cause 403 errors for private channel operations.
Message formatting uses Slack's proprietary 'mrkdwn' format, which differs from standard Markdown.
research_notes: Analysis focuses on Slack as the primary provider for chat-based widget workflows as per baseline data. Users seeking a generic website 'live chat' widget may also consider the Intercom or Crisp nodes.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Analysis focuses on Slack as the primary provider for chat-based widget workflows as per baseline data. Users seeking a generic website 'live chat' widget may also consider the Intercom or Crisp nodes.
